title: Men Dont Cry
overview: When Joaquin learns that his abusive father is about to be taken off life support, he avoids the hospital and spends his time driving through the city with his best friend, Luis, trying to outrun his anger and confusion. At home, his pregnant wife Lucia urges him to face what he has been avoiding, not for his father’s sake, but for his own and for the family he is about to build. As the night exposes the depth of his wounds and his fear of becoming the man who hurt him, Joaquin must decide whether to confront his past or keep running from it.
